style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a titled card headed RICECO with a caption beneath reading A SIX-STEP FORMULA FOR A PROMPT, listing six numbered rows, each a short navy bold label followed by a few words: '1 ROLE - give the AI a persona', '2 INSTRUCTION - state the exact task', '3 CONTEXT - the background and audience', '4 EXAMPLES - show an ideal output', '5 CONSTRAINTS - the rules and limits', '6 OUTPUT FORMAT - how to structure the answer'. On the right, a simple cycle: a box labelled AI OUTPUT connects by arrow to a box labelled VERIFY, which connects by arrow to a box labelled TRUST. A rust return arrow loops from VERIFY back to AI OUTPUT, labelled IF IT DOES NOT CHECK OUT. Below the cycle, a small caption reads VERIFY, THEN TRUST. Calm, architectural, legible labels, spelled exactly as given. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. On the left, a titled card headed RICECO with a caption beneath reading A SIX-STEP FORMULA FOR A PROMPT, listing six numbered rows, each a short navy bold label followed by a few words: '1 ROLE - give the AI a persona', '2 INSTRUCTION - state the exact task', '3 CONTEXT - the background and audience', '4 EXAMPLES - show an ideal output', '5 CONSTRAINTS - the rules and limits', '6 OUTPUT FORMAT - how to structure the answer'. On the right, a simple cycle: a box labelled AI OUTPUT connects by arrow to a box labelled VERIFY, which connects by arrow to a box labelled TRUST. A rust return arrow loops from VERIFY back to AI OUTPUT, labelled IF IT DOES NOT CHECK OUT. Below the cycle, a small caption reads VERIFY, THEN TRUST. Calm, architectural, legible labels, spelled exactly as given. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
